name: Sports-Plugins
description: Curated sports intelligence plugins for Claude Code, Codex, and AI coding assistants. Live sabermetrics and analytics across MLB, NFL, NBA, college football, and NCAA Division I college baseball — plus team-specific intelligence, editorial voice, data visualization, and sports game development. Wraps the Blaze Sports Intel data engine at blazesportsintel.com/mcp (31 tools across 5 sports).

plugins.name: cbb-sabermetrics
plugins.description: Live college baseball sabermetrics for 330 NCAA DI programs — wOBA, wRC+, FIP, BABIP, ISO, conference power index, SOS-adjusted rankings. Wraps the Blaze Sports Intel MCP at blazesportsintel.com/mcp. Free tier, 30 requests/min, no API key.

plugins.name: texas-longhorns-intel
plugins.description: Texas Longhorns baseball intelligence — scouting reports, SEC matchup previews, roster evaluation, NIL efficiency analysis, program history. Depends on cbb-sabermetrics.

plugins.name: cardinals-intel
plugins.description: St. Louis Cardinals baseball intelligence — tactical analysis, roster construction, player development, trade posture, media framing. Will depend on mlb-sabermetrics for live data. Coming soon.

plugins.name: mlb-sabermetrics
plugins.description: Live MLB sabermetrics via BSI MCP — scoreboard, standings, team detail, game detail, league leaders. 5 tools wrapping the bsi_get_mlb_* family. Free tier, 30 req/min. Coming soon.

plugins.name: nfl-analytics
plugins.description: Live NFL analytics via BSI MCP — scoreboard, standings, team detail, game detail, league leaders. 5 tools wrapping the bsi_get_nfl_* family. Coming soon.

plugins.name: nba-analytics
plugins.description: Live NBA analytics via BSI MCP — scoreboard, standings, team detail, game detail, league leaders. 5 tools wrapping the bsi_get_nba_* family. Coming soon.

plugins.name: cfb-analytics
plugins.description: Live college football analytics via BSI MCP — scoreboard, standings, rankings, team detail, game detail, transfer portal tracker. 6 tools wrapping the bsi_get_cfb_* family. Coming soon.

plugins.name: sports-storytelling
plugins.description: Editorial voice for sports content that centers the human element — athlete profiles, program narratives, community impact stories, newsletter copy, podcast briefs. Coming soon.

plugins.name: sports-viz
plugins.description: Data visualization patterns for sports — Savant-style charts with texture encoding, spray charts, percentile bands, biomechanics motion rendering, matchup theaters. Coming soon.

plugins.name: sports-arcade-dev
plugins.description: Building browser-based sports games — Canvas/WebGL physics, input handling, scoring, leaderboard integration, Cloudflare Pages deployment. Coming soon.
